francophone.excerpt: Hicham Harb est suspecté d’avoir supervisé le commando qui a tué six personnes à Paris le 9 août 1982. Il avait été arrêté en Cisjordanie en 2025.

francophone.excerpt: Les députés devaient débattre d’un texte très contesté par la gauche, que les députés macronistes ont finalement décidé de retirer.

francophone.excerpt: Des stimulants cognitifs, qui peuvent s’avérer dangereux, comme la Ritaline circulent hors cadre médical et légal, ciblant notamment les étudiants en quête de performance.

francophone.title: "Quand je suis entrée, il m'a sautée dessus comme une bête sauvage" : une ancienne Miss accuse Donald Trump d'agression sexuelle
francophone.excerpt: Selon Béatrice Keul, ancienne finaliste de Miss Suisse et de Miss Europe, aujourd'hui âgée de 54 ans, les faits se sont produits en 1993. Elle s'est confiée au journal "Ouest-France".

anglophone.title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
anglophone.excerpt: Malema is appealing against the decision, which means he is not going to prison immediately.

anglophone.excerpt: Pope Leo XIV condemns "tyrants" fueling war with billions. His calls for global peace during his Africa trip come amid rising tensions with President Trump.

anglophone.title: RFK Jr. defends his health agenda and Trump's proposed budget cuts in hearing
anglophone.excerpt: In his first appearance this year, the health secretary is taking questions on his record on health, including his controversial moves on vaccines.

anglophone.excerpt: Investigators say Justin Fairfax shot his wife, Cerina, multiple times before turning the gun on himself.

anglophone.title: Commission of Fine Arts votes to move ahead with Trump's proposed victory arch
anglophone.excerpt: The seven-member body, whose ranks are composed of Trump appointees, was expected to approve the arch. The proposed monument strongly resembles Paris' Arc de Triomphe, but almost 100 feet taller.

anglophone.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings

anglophone.title: Russia launches deadliest aerial attack in months, killing 18 in Ukraine

anglophone.title: NPR receives $113 million in charitable gifts
anglophone.excerpt: "My hope is that this commitment provides the stability and the spark NPR needs to innovate boldly and strengthen its national network," says Connie Ballmer, who gave $80 million of the $113 million.

anglophone.title: Iran War timeline continues to shift. And, jury rules Live Nation acted as monopoly
anglophone.excerpt: Trump continues to try to declare victory in Iran as the timeline for the war's end shifts. And, a jury determined that Live Nation acted as a monopoly and overcharged ticket buyers.
